message:
test(rpc): add nil-storage regression tests for handleCommentList and handleCommentAdd (bd-10)

The nil checks were already present in the code (commit f2917274), but
lacked test coverage. Add unit tests verifying both handlers return proper
error responses when storage is nil, matching the pattern in
server_delete_test.go.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
